name: Tronox Holdings plc
description: Tronox Holdings plc is a global leader in the mining, production, and marketing of inorganic minerals and chemicals. The company specializes in the extraction and processing of titanium ore, zircon, and rare earths, and is the world’s leading vertically integrated manufacturer of titanium dioxide (TiO2) pigment. With operations spanning six continents, Tronox provides essential materials that enhance the brightness and durability of paints, coatings, plastics, and paper. Committed to sustainable and safe operating practices, the company leverages its technical expertise to deliver high-quality products that support a wide range of industrial and consumer applications worldwide.
